description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

【RECRUITMENT CLOSED BY ORGANIZER】

This tour aimed to reach the summit of Bonomine (棒ノ嶺) via the beautiful Shiratani Valley route through gorge terrain, learning the basics of stream walking and enjoying the experience. Lunch and dinner featured game meat (jibié) restaurant boxed meals and dinner, with educational information about game meat cuisine.

【Fee】¥23,000 per person (includes guide, boxed lunch and dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Tsuyoshi Shinohara, member of the Japan Mountain Guides Association, climbing guide stage III

【What to bring】20-liter backpack (with thorough waterproofing), full stream-walking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountain climbing equipment, bus fare, bath admission fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: ℹ️ RECRUITMENT CLOSED: Boasting of Bonomine's gorge, stream walking on Naguri River Shiratani Valley, and game meat dinner tour
